query: SELECT id, ghlContactId, contactName, contactPhone, callDirection, callSource, callTimestamp, duration, tenantId FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Sherri%' OR contactName LIKE '%Richter%' ORDER BY callTimestamp DESC LIMIT 10;
